text.message: Is Portland hawk referring to the hockey team ?
nah its just a gamertag ive used for a long time
but now ive heard of the hockey team lol
Blue I don't get it, you've robbed me 3x here
Red has a city and ows setup
I was banking on a single 11 or unblocked 5
Oh good one of those games
Blue has continued to rob me
So until I get some training on that, yes
Childish but why do I expect better on here lol
I was never ahead of red
Red any way to get a wheat
cutting wheat is the way to go
5 block looking pretty good to me
